title: Remove 'Senior' word from Projects section

requirements.text: In frontend/src/pages/Projects.tsx, remove every occurrence of the word 'Senior' (case-sensitive and case-insensitive variants) from all static text, labels, headings, and any hardcoded strings displayed in the Projects page and its project cards. Do not alter data fetched dynamically from the backend.
acceptanceCriteria: The word 'Senior' (in any casing) does not appear in any static/hardcoded text on the Projects page.
All project cards and section headings render correctly without the word 'Senior'.
Dynamically fetched project data from the backend is not altered or filtered.
No other pages or components are modified.

constraints: Only modify frontend/src/pages/Projects.tsx (and any directly related Projects-specific components if 'Senior' appears there).
Do not modify any immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Removing 'Senior' from backend data or the database.
Modifying any pages other than the Projects section.
Changing any styling, layout, or other content on the Projects page.
